name: codex-orchestra
description: Reviewable, resumable workflows executed through native Codex agents

interface.longDescription: Create, review, run, and resume YAML workflows through native Codex agents, checks, worktrees, review, and approvals without an external control plane.
defaultPrompt: Create and run a workflow for this repository task.
Show me a reviewable workflow before executing this change.
Resume the interrupted Orchestra workflow run.
